steps.title: Compare Lewis's subjects
steps.content: Text 1 says Lewis is known for historical and mythological subjects but also sculpted other subjects. Text 2 identifies portrait busts as another important subject in her career.

steps.title: Find the shared agreement
steps.content: Choice A conflicts with Text 2, which says portrait busts have typically been ignored. Choice B is unsupported because neither text says The Death of Cleopatra is her most famous piece. Choice C is not discussed. Both texts show that her subjects varied. The answer is D.
